title: ricotia lunaria
intro: Ricotia lunaria, also known as the moon carrot or silver carrot, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Borage family and is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant's roots and leaves have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ricotia lunaria include reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of colds and coughs, as well as improving digestion and reducing anxiety. Ricotia lunaria can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
